purpose: Resolve exact-tree project-instruction parity for the 25 rank-6 rows newly advanced by rank 5 without observing agent results.
terminal_status_note: This artifact is terminal only for instruction-parity. It neither selects candidates nor settles boundedness, evaluator feasibility, isolation, or reproduction.

local_collection_snapshot.role: Ignored full-content review cache; every terminal fact needed to resume is reduced to Git blob and content hashes below.

discovery_contract.claude_code: Claude Code 2.1.215 behavioral discovery/import observations: applicable CLAUDE.md, symlinks/imports, and path rules; no automatic AGENTS.md discovery.
discovery_contract.codex: Codex 0.144.6 root-AGENTS behavioral observation plus official root-to-task discovery and empty project_doc_fallback_filenames.

method: Enumerate every exact base with git ls-tree -r from the ignored bare-repository cache and verify revision^{tree} against the rank-5 base_tree_hash.

Read every AGENTS.override.md, AGENTS.md, CLAUDE.md, CLAUDE.local.md, and .claude/rules Markdown blob from the exact tree; record Git blob and decoded-content SHA-256 without copying full bodies into the tracked artifact.
Resolve root-to-changed-path scope, symlinks, explicit imports/adapters, and path-index applicability. Inactive descendant instructions do not affect the result.
Apply the preregistered semantic-equivalence rule: no guidance on either side and byte-equivalent adapters pass; any material one-sided active instruction fails.

review_provenance.primary: Codex exact-content review against the frozen discovery contract
review_provenance.claude_cli_cross_review: Two bounded read-only calls were attempted during the documentation and complex-case audits, produced no output, and were terminated without file changes; they contributed no decision evidence.

assessments.project_instruction_profile: The task-active exact-tree instruction chain contains AGENTS.md guidance with no CLAUDE.md adapter or equivalent Claude-discovered path.
assessments.reason: Only Codex receives material project, safety, architecture, command, or testing constraints for the changed paths.

assessments.project_instruction_profile: Root CLAUDE.md is a symlink to root AGENTS.md, with no task-active override that changes either chain.
assessments.reason: Both agents receive the byte-identical root AGENTS.md content.

effective_codex_chain: AGENTS.md -> CLAUDE.md -> same four path rules
assessments.project_instruction_profile: Root AGENTS.md directs Codex to the root CLAUDE.md SSOT; that SSOT indexes the same four path-applicable rule files that Claude loads for the changed database, storage, dashboard, and test paths.
assessments.reason: The explicit Codex adapter and canonical path-rule index deliver the same task-relevant guidance.
